articles.title: Elon suffers another day short of trillionaire status
articles.description: Right now he's merely a several-hundred-billionaire, according to Bloomberg's Billionaires Index.

articles.title: Cerebras stock plunges after earnings as CEO says margin outlook was misunderstood
articles.description: In its first earnings report since going public, the AI chipmaker forecast a narrower gross margin in its core business, scaring investors.

articles.title: AI was supposed to kill engineering jobs, but new data suggests they’re the most resilient
articles.description: While AI dominates the layoff narrative, engineers are actually making up a larger share of new hires, according to SignalFire data.

articles.title: AI researchers continue to leave Google for its rivals
articles.description: Top AI researchers Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel are leaving Google for Anthropic, following departures from top scientists Noam Shazeer and John Jumper.

articles.title: The memory chip crunch is paying off for this US company
articles.description: Revenue quadrupled to $41.45 billion compared with the same period a year ago. The company's profit, meanwhile, rose from $1.88 billion to an incredible $28.2 billion year-over-year.

articles.title: New website names and shames companies that still don’t offer passkeys to users
articles.description: According to a new site, 24% of the most popular websites in the world don't offer support for passkeys, which are considered the most secure way to log in to apps and services.

articles.title: Companies are scrambling to stop employees from maxing out AI budgets with small tasks
articles.description: The tokenmaxxing era was brief. We now appear to be entering the era of token rationing.

articles.title: Here’s why Slate changed the battery in its cheap EV truck
articles.description: While there was probably a moment when Slate’s leadership had to green-light the switch from one battery type to another, the momentum toward that decision had been building for years.

articles.title: Facebook rolls out an AI companion app for creators
articles.description: The new app, which is currently being tested with select creators, will have Facebook's recently launched AI creator assistant built into it.

articles.title: Deezer says its new feature lets fans remix songs with artist consent
articles.description: Global music streaming service Deezer is taking a contrarian approach to AI, even as it adds a feature that lets fans remix songs.

articles.title: Agility Robotics plans to go public via SPAC in a $2.5B deal
articles.description: Agility Robotics, the humanoid robotics startup that spun out of Oregon State University in 2015, expects to generate $620 million in proceeds.

articles.title: NTSB launches probe into fatal Texas Tesla crash
articles.description: The safety board, known for its thorough investigations, is probing the crash alongside the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration.

articles.title: Figma adds code layers, support for animations, more AI features in new update
articles.description: Figma's update adds a new code layer, support for motion and shaders, and the ability to create custom plug-ins for various tasks using AI.

articles.title: Zoox upgrades its robotaxi as it prepares for commercial service
articles.description: The new Zoox robotaxi has more cushioning, lighter colors, and a better microphone and speaker for communicating with Zoox Support.

articles.title: This new tracking label could help solve cargo theft
articles.description: The Samsara Tracking Label hides a BLE system that can offer real-time location in a disposable package.

articles.title: OpenAI unveils its first custom chip, built by Broadcom
articles.description: Named Jalapeño, the new processor was designed specifically for the unique needs of OpenAI's inference systems.

articles.title: If you want to cut your screen time, just get a Brick
articles.description: After years of struggling to curb my screen time, apparently all I needed was a $59 hunk of plastic.

articles.title: 3 days left to save up to $190 on your TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 pass
articles.description: You have just 3 days left to save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 before Early Bird rates end on June 26 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register today.

articles.title: Valor Equity Partners looks to raise a $2.5B Fund VII, per Bloomberg
articles.description: New details have emerged about Valor's latest fund, which last year announced it was raising an unspecified amount of capital.

articles.title: Slate Auto’s radically simple electric truck starts at $24,950
articles.description: The Jeff Bezos-backed startup finally revealed more pricing details for its debut EV, including a $29,950 starting price for the SUV variant, and boosted the base range to 205 miles.

articles.title: One-two punch delivered in global operation disrupts cybercrime "assembly line"
articles.description: "Operation Endgame" simultaneously disrupts two widely used crime tools.

articles.title: Underpromise, overdeliver? Hands-on with the $24,950 Slate auto.
articles.description: It has 205 miles of bare-bones range.

articles.title: Disney agreed to $50M settlement over claims it made live-TV streaming expensive
articles.description: Lawsuit alleged Disney inflated market prices by making carriers include ESPN.

articles.title: Experimental wine bottle tracks oxygen moving through the cork
articles.description: The small bit of air in the bottle sees oxygen and other chemicals move in and out.

articles.title: FCC plans ID mandate that could block anonymous use of prepaid burner phones
articles.description: Privacy advocates and domestic violence groups say ID mandate is a big mistake.

articles.title: Formula E reveals first calendar for GEN4 with lots of real race tracks
articles.description: Brands Hatch, COTA, and Zandvoort will all hold an e-Prix in 2027.

articles.title: Google starts lowering Play Store fees, making good on Epic Games settlement
articles.description: A few additional markets will get the lower fees this year ahead of a global rollout in 2027.

articles.title: Elon Musk denies Tesla’s Autopilot caused crash that killed grandmother
articles.description: Tesla, accused of failing to fix design flaws, blames driver pressing accelerator.

articles.title: Military branches restore flu shot requirement after virus swept through base
articles.description: Branches received exceptions to Hegseth's policy that made the shot optional.

articles.title: Slate Auto's truck builder goes live for its $25k electric pickup
articles.description: From a bare-bones pickup to a loaded, wrapped SUV, here's what some Slates will cost.

articles.title: We got a sneak peek of the final space shuttle set to go on public display
articles.description: "It is an incredible exhibit and incredible sight."

articles.title: White House app auto-downloads to government phones, can't be uninstalled
articles.description: “It’s shooting pure unadulterated propaganda into our veins,” says one worker.

articles.title: White House drastically shortens deadline for dropping quantum-vulnerable crypto
articles.description: Order warns of national security risks if post-quantum cryptography isn't adopted in time.

articles.title: US's climate.gov site, taken down by Trump, relaunched by nonprofit
articles.description: Climate.us has now restored everything taken down by the government.

articles.title: Odd police video shows drone removing knife from motionless suspect
articles.description: Promo video comes as more US police departments fly drones as first responders.

articles.title: Oracle’s 21,000 layoffs help drive its debt-fueled AI investments
articles.description: Oracle is spending billions on data center infrastructure to support AI.

articles.title: A curious crossover: The Toyota C-HR review
articles.description: Although it's on the smaller side, this electric vehicle is not very chill.

articles.title: ABC asks viewers to protest FCC attempt to "control who is allowed" on The View
articles.description: "The FCC wants to control who is allowed on the show," ABC ad tells viewers.

articles.title: Early land animals skipped the tadpole phase
articles.description: Current amphibian development may not have been typical of early land vertebrates.

articles.title: Trump may be mystery patient in odd case of 79yo getting experimental obesity drug
articles.description: White House spokesperson denied it was Trump only after story was published.

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **AI对就业影响逆转**：新数据显示，工程师岗位并未如预期被AI取代，反而展现出最强韧性；同时AI研究人员持续从谷歌流向竞争对手，人才争夺加剧。

2. **企业AI预算管理困境**：公司正紧急采取措施，防止员工因处理琐碎任务而耗尽AI预算；Deezer推出需获艺术家同意的歌曲混音功能，平衡AI应用与版权。

3. **自动驾驶与出行安全**：Zoox升级自动驾驶出租车以准备商用；美国国家运输安全委员会对得州致命特斯拉车祸展开调查；Slate解释其廉价电动卡车更换电池的原因。

4. **芯片与硬件行业动态**：美国存储芯片公司因供应紧张获利；Cerebras财报后股价暴跌，CEO称利润率预期被误解；Agility Robotics计划通过SPAC上市，估值25亿美元。

5. **科技公司产品与功能更新**：Facebook推出面向创作者的AI伴侣应用；Figma新增代码层、动画支持及更多AI功能；新网站点名批评未提供密码钥匙（passkey）的公司；追踪标签技术有望解决货物盗窃问题。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：AI并未如预期取代工程师岗位，反而使该职业更具韧性，同时企业正面临AI预算被琐碎任务消耗的新挑战。

articles.description: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.

articles.description: OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation.

articles.description: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.

articles.description: OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.

articles.description: Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to employees worldwide, marking one of OpenAI’s largest enterprise AI rollouts.

articles.title: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises
articles.description: OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI with confidence.

articles.title: Improving health intelligence in ChatGPT
articles.description: Learn how GPT-5.5 Instant improves ChatGPT’s health and wellness responses with stronger reasoning, better context, clearer communication, and physician-informed evaluations.

articles.title: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
articles.description: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **模型微调与优化技术突破**：英伟达推出NeMo AutoModel加速Transformer微调；社区探讨超越LoRA的微调方法，并引入FFASR语音识别基准测试及PP-OCRv6多语言OCR模型（支持50种语言，参数量从1.5M到34.5M）。

2. **智能体与安全研究进展**：CUGA框架发布24个轻量级智能体应用示例；OpenAI与博通联合推出LLM优化推理芯片；研究指出AI智能体存在“MosaicLeaks”秘密泄露风险，并推动本地模型在开源项目（如OpenClaw）中的免费自动分类。

3. **开放标准与跨域协作**：OpenAI倡导建立高级AI共享标准，并展示GPT-5助力免疫学家破解三年科学谜题；Hugging Face每周发布huggingface_hub更新，结合AI与人工审核；Transformers.js实验性支持跨域存储API。

4. **行业应用与安全工具**：Omio公司探索对话式旅行未来；OpenAI发布Daybreak工具集，旨在保护全球组织安全。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：OpenAI与博通联合推出LLM专用推理芯片，标志着AI硬件从通用计算向专用优化的关键转折，同时GPT-5在科研领域的突破性应用进一步验证了大型语言模型在专业问题解决上的巨大潜力。

articles.title: China to introduce new train timetable from July 1, including high-speed train service between Beijing and Urumqi

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. 中国将于7月1日起实施新的列车运行图，其中包括开通北京至乌鲁木齐的高铁服务。  
2. 中国专家批评菲律宾外长称日菲海洋划界“与中国无关”的言论，警告此举别有用心，意图超越双边谈判范畴。  

今日最值得关注的发展是：中国高铁网络进一步延伸至西北边疆，同时中方就南海相关争议明确表达立场，警示外部势力借双边谈判之名行干涉之实。
